packageRules.description: Group dev-only dependency bumps into a single weekly PR - easier to review and rebase than per-dep PRs.
Group framework peer-deps (react/vue/svelte) separately so a wider review can happen if any of them ships a breaking change.
Lockfile-only maintenance once a month so transitive bumps come through even when direct deps haven't changed.
schedule: before 6am on the first day of the month

packageRules.description: Auto-merge patch updates for devDependencies once the suite is stable. Keep blocked for now (false) - flip to true after 4-6 weeks of clean signal.
